message:
✨ Add restart backend button to connection lost banner (#814)

When the backend goes down, the "Connection lost" snackbar now shows a
Restart button. Clicking it sends POST /restart-backend to the kc-agent
(port 8585), which kills the old backend process and starts a new one.

Three-phase UX:
1. "Restarting..." with spinner while the agent processes the request
2. "Restarted, waiting for connection..." after agent confirms success
3. Banner transitions to "Reconnected" once health check passes

If the agent is unreachable (also down), falls back to copying
./startup-oauth.sh to clipboard so the user can paste it in a terminal.

Agent-side changes:
- New POST /restart-backend endpoint on kc-agent server
- Uses lsof -sTCP:LISTEN to surgically kill only the backend listener
- Starts new backend via go run ./cmd/console with GOWORK=off
- Waits 3s then health-checks before responding

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
